yeah, is strange.
<@1485258210209435701> <@1470253170209853632> 
The numbers shown in Salvador damage card is wrong, or the damage itself is lower than it should (maybe the new final damage buff is not working).
And it was about 50% of furnace, so it should be +100% final damage. It did half, so it might just be that the buff wasn't applied at all
yeah, that is what I though
They are already checking it https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1506033451252584665/1506033451252584665
Oh lol, good then
Thanks for the feedback — this will be fixed in a future update.
✅「Resolved」Salvador's liberation shows incorrect damage ammount
ok, it was "fixed", but now he seemingly just does little damage. the description is correct to the damage he deals, but the damage is still the same

this is with 818 furnace and after like 10 uses of the skill. even if it were just the damage from furnace alone, 818 furnace against a boss is 7.3k, and it's almost a 100% furnace consumption, so he should deal +200% final damage bonus, which means he should do about 22k. but he still does much less
<@1437487264023318668> am I correct or did I just misread the buff

It looks the max hp % is based on your actual max hp not the furnace. So if you have 2k hp, it is 40% * 2 extra final dmg
numbers look correct to me if that is their calculation
It seems like some damage is missing
<@1485258210209435701>  改完之後傷害低了很多，這正常嗎？ 明明堆積的熔爐量比較多但打出來卻比原本少了快一半？
不要跟我說抽+12結果被優化欸
我都已經多花四回合去疊融爐結果傷害還更低？？ 請給我一個合理的答覆
Oh that is weird. Yeah something wrong here

But even then it's incorrect. Remember, we're only counting the damage from furnace. So it's it's a +80% final damage increase then the furnace alone will deal 13k. But the skill also scales up with the furnace accumulated throughout the enture battle, so it should do more
He basically does the same damage he did before the buff
Yeah gotcha. Hope devs can clarify/fix what’s happening

✅「Resolved」New gift code doesn't work
Accurately calculating damage numbers might be one of the fun parts of the game.<:Jenkin_think:1459079611131494543>

Is not exactly just a calculation problem.
Is mostly because some units and wheels get benefits from killing an enemy, but this only works if they give the last hit with direct damage. This makes them incompatible with certain unit's that could have been otherwise good combinations, like Castor and Saya because of their corrosion, Arachne because the execute stacks don't count as a direct kill, or even the aequor realm, because the extra tentacle attacks from red tentacle stance don't count as a kill, even if the unit activated then with his active damage.
It would be mostly a quality of life and boost in versatility
we also explained an easy way to implement it, if the team would consider it
Got it — I'll log this as a suggestion for improving versatility!<:Alva_goodjob:1468259169965707398>
✅「Answered」Doresain + Corrosion
Thank you for being here to elaborate.

content:
突然有個有關劇情問題想問，會考慮重製(知道現階段不太可能，未來也應該機會不大)或者以小說的形式去重新展開被壓縮的劇情嗎？

目前的劇情還是很不錯，只是一些細節上的處理不夠令人滿意，有些會有點突兀或者讓人有吃書的感覺。感覺很多地方應該是要有什麼伏筆的，只是沒有時間去寫。

考慮到一些玩家會想要設計集之類的週邊，那出一本小說似乎也可以是一個選項，雖然「小說」嚴格意義上不能算是週邊🧐

而且出小說似乎也不錯的原因是，目前的遊戲體驗和普通視覺小說差不多，只是選項的出現並不影響走向(或者影響微小)，寫成小說似乎也差不多。

如果不想玩家守密人出現在小說裡，小說的內容還可以是從別的調查員甚至喚醒體的角度出發🤔

怎麼感覺像在勸人出小說()，不過我其實很意故事內容，聽說忘卻篇的故事有被壓縮，所以才很想讓原來的創意能重見天日，無論用什麼形式👀

而且小說可以勉強算是紙質「週邊」，應該也出不了什麼錯吧(
thread_title: 會考慮重製劇情或者其他形式的重製劇情嗎？
